chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5725 of 2016 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.27957/2016 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner states that provisional assessment was taken place, however, finalization is pending due to this petition. Learned counsel further states that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions to the respondent Department to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent Department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in such terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
